name: implement-compression-strategies
description: Create compression strategy implementations for context management
author: reaatech

tasks.description: Create compression utilities and SummarizerService interface
tasks.note: Strategies implement ICompressionStrategy directly; no abstract base class needed. Export shared helpers like calculateMessageTokens and preserveSystemMessages here.

tasks.description: Implement SlidingWindowStrategy that keeps recent messages within budget
tasks.algorithm: Keep system messages, slide window from newest to oldest until budget reached
methods: compress(messages: Message[], config: CompressionConfig, tokenCounter: TokenCounter): Promise<CompressionResult>

tasks.description: Implement SummarizationStrategy that uses LLM to summarize old messages
tasks.algorithm: Identify old messages, call LLM to summarize, replace with summary message
methods: compress(messages: Message[], config: CompressionConfig, tokenCounter: TokenCounter): Promise<CompressionResult>

tasks.description: Implement HybridStrategy combining sliding window and summarization
tasks.algorithm: Keep last N messages as-is, summarize everything before that
methods: compress(messages: Message[], config: CompressionConfig, tokenCounter: TokenCounter): Promise<CompressionResult>

tasks.description: Create SummarizerService interface and mock implementation
Create index.ts to export compression classes

checks.description: Verify TypeScript compilation succeeds with no errors
Verify >90% test coverage for compression strategies
Verify each strategy has tests with various message sets
Verify no 'any' types in public API
Verify all public methods have JSDoc documentation with examples
